inputs.label: Club Speed
inputs.businessContext: Club head speed at impact, typically 70-130 mph for amateur golfers

inputs.label: Smash Factor
inputs.businessContext: Ball speed divided by club speed, typically 1.35-1.5 for drivers

inputs.label: Launch Angle
inputs.businessContext: Initial vertical angle of ball flight, optimal around 10-15 degrees

inputs.label: Spin Rate
inputs.businessContext: Backspin rate, typical driver spin 2000-3000 rpm

inputs.label: Wind Speed
inputs.businessContext: Positive for tailwind, negative for headwind

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Elevation above sea level, higher altitude reduces air density
